steps.title: Use dilation property
steps.content: A dilation changes side lengths by the scale factor, but it preserves angle measures. So angle $X$ in triangle $XYZ$ equals the corresponding angle in triangle $ABC$.

steps.title: Match the corresponding angle
steps.content: From the figure, the angle corresponding to $X$ measures $60^{\circ}$. Therefore, angle $X$ also measures $60^{\circ}$. The answer is C.
